title: Data Provenance Manifest - Companion Manuscript Submission
description: Complete chain of custody for all quantum hardware data. Every hardware result is linked to retrievable job IDs with raw bitstring counts stored locally.

ibm_quantum.calibration: 156 gate errors from ibm_fez Target API (snapshot date in enriched files)

physical_qubits.4q_experiments: Auto-mapped by Qiskit transpiler (optimization_level=1); layouts in ibm_qubit_layout.json

ibm_quantum.transpilation: optimization_level=1, native gate set: ECR + RZ + SX + X

rigetti_oq.backend: Ankaa-3 (84 transmon qubits, iSWAP native) via Open Quantum

job_ids.4q_grouped: 79 unique UUIDs (29 K* bases + 50 random bases) embedded in oq_grouped_results_20260316.json
job_ids.full_dump: oq_all_jobs.json (471 total jobs across all experiments)

rigetti_oq.calibration: Not available via OQ API; qubit selection based on published Ankaa-3 calibration report
rigetti_oq.transpilation: Server-side compilation to iSWAP + RZ native gate set

anti_spoofing_evidence.raw_bitstring_counts: Stored in all enriched IBM files (per-job raw_counts), Rigetti 4q (n4_kstar_raw_counts + n4_rand_raw_counts), and Rigetti 8q (individual circuit JSON files in 8qubit-w-rigetti/raw/).
anti_spoofing_evidence.job_ids: IBM: 48 job IDs (12 W-repeat + 3 sweep + 15 three-arm + 18 March 7). Rigetti: 256 OQ UUIDs (79 grouped-4q + 177 8q). Total: 304 unique job IDs.
anti_spoofing_evidence.calibration_snapshots: IBM: full 156-qubit gate error map from backend Target API. Rigetti: not exposed by OQ API (documented platform limitation).
anti_spoofing_evidence.physical_qubit_layout: IBM 4q: [0,1,2,3] via re-transpilation. IBM 8q: [140-147] from original run. Rigetti 4q: [0-3]. Rigetti 8q: [0-7].
anti_spoofing_evidence.cross_platform_consistency: W-state K* advantage confirmed on IBM ibm_fez (dF=+0.33+/-0.07, 4 runs) and Rigetti Ankaa-3 (dF=+0.25) with different native gate sets (ECR vs iSWAP).
anti_spoofing_evidence.independent_verification: Any party with IBM Quantum / Open Quantum credentials can retrieve job results using stored job IDs. Raw counts enable independent density matrix reconstruction.

ibm_enriched.description: IBM hardware results with embedded provenance (job IDs, calibration, qubit layout, transpilation)

ibm_march7.description: Initial hardware tests with provenance blocks added via timestamp-correlated job linkage

rigetti_4q.description: Rigetti Ankaa-3 4-qubit W-state grouped experiment with raw bitstring counts

files.raw_counts: n4_kstar_raw_counts (29 bases x 1000 shots) + n4_rand_raw_counts (50 bases x 1000 shots)

rigetti_8q.description: Rigetti Ankaa-3 8-qubit compositional W-state with per-circuit raw counts

files.description: Task manifest mapping job IDs to circuits
116 product-state circuit raw counts (1000 shots each)

rigetti_8q_analysis.description: Analysis outputs from 8q experiment (reconstructed density matrices, null model, qubit selection)

files.description: Physical qubit maps for all IBM circuit types (re-transpiled)
Full IBM job dump for andrew.craton account (18 DONE + 3 QUEUED)
Full IBM job dump for quantum_ibm_02@kootru.com account (15 jobs)
files.note: Filename says quantum_ibm_01 but contains quantum_ibm_02 data (account was renamed after file creation)

files.description: Full OQ scheduler API dump (471 jobs across all experiments)

measurement_set.description: Machine-readable K* measurement set and tensor-product bases (promised in SM Data Availability section)

files.description: All 137 K*-selected Pauli operators for n=4, with weight distribution and generation method
The 29 tensor-product bases covering all 137 operators, with per-basis operator coverage map

analysis.description: Analysis results referenced by manuscript (kept in root for script compatibility)

files.description: Bootstrap confidence intervals for Rigetti fidelity differences

auxiliary.description: Intermediate/exploratory results not part of final submission. Retained for reproducibility.
files: ghz_dfe_results.json - GHZ direct fidelity estimation test
percentile_results.json, rdm_fidelity_results.json, saturate_fill_results.json - Minor metric outputs

known_limitations: IBM job results are not publicly queryable; verification requires IBM Quantum account credentials.
Rigetti/OQ does not expose backend calibration (T1, T2, gate errors) via API.
March 7 job-to-file linkage uses timestamp correlation (gap >3 min between clusters), not embedded job IDs.
IBM 4q physical qubit layouts are re-transpiled (same optimization_level=1); actual qubits may differ if backend calibration shifted.
3 of 21 March 7 IBM jobs remain in QUEUED status (stale; likely cancelled/expired). All 18 DONE jobs are accounted for.
Zenodo DOI placeholder (10.5281/zenodo.XXXXXXX) must be replaced after upload.
